text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O seems tired, so I suggest we go for
a walk. Soon enough, we're stopped by a few
fans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Thank you for your gracious support! I shall
return all your favor with... an opera of gratitude!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... D-did you see their beaming faces? My brilliance has come through once again!
choice_data_list:
Isn't it exhausting to perform an opera each
time you want to thank your fans?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Noblesse oblige. Even in the most inclement of
weather, the sun must rise to bring light to the
world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of her races, her efforts to please her fans
are taking a toll on her. Maybe I should adjust her
racing schedule.
